costs_slippage.handling: qfa CLI exposes no native transaction-cost/slippage parameter; evaluation applies ex-post 5 bps one-way turnover haircut in direct qfa-engine replay.

data_source: Alpaca real market data via qfa AlpacaGateway; no CSV; --data-csv was not used
decision_rationale: Rejected: median random-window Sharpe after 5 bps turnover cost is <= 0 or lower-tail instability fails AR-029 falsifier.

orthogonality.method: Pearson correlation of daily equity returns from retained latest.json curves

parameter_stability.interpretation: Tiny pre-specified neighbor check only; no broad grid search or after-the-fact parameter selection.
